title: U-BDS/nf_xpatial pipeline parameters
description: This pipeline is used to automate analysis of Xenium data

input_output_options.title: Input/output Options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

outdir.description: The output directory where the results will be saved. You have to use absolute paths to storage on Cloud infrastructure.

marker_gene_list.description: The list of marker genes to evaluate and plot

gene_whitelist.description: A list of features to always keep if you subset by variable features.

clustering_methods.description: This lets you choose the clustering methods to use for your data

skip_man_ann_dim_plot.description: Skip generating the Manual Annotation Dim Plot

columns_to_remove.description: A comma-delimited list of unnecessary columns to remove from the xenium object

skip_percentile_filtering.description: Skip the percentile based filtering where cells are filtered based on nFeature percentiles instead of absolute nFeature value

min_percentile.description: The minimum percentile threshold for nFeature percentile based filtering

max_percentile.description: The maximum percentile threshold for nFeature percentile based filtering

min_nFeature.description: The minimum nFeature threshold for nFeature filtering

max_nFeature.description: The maximum nFeature threshold for nFeature filtering

min_nCount.description: The minimum nCount threshold for nCount filtering

max_nCount.description: The maximum nCount threshold for nCount filtering

min_cell_area.description: The minimum cell area for cell area filtering

max_cell_area.description: The maximum cell area for cell area filtering

filter_features.description: A list of features to filter from samples

normalization_method.description: Choose the normalization method to use (log, and/or area). Multiple options can be chosen in a comma delimited list

skip_norm_ncount.description: Skip generating the nCount plot for normalized data

skip_norm_nfeature.description: Skip generating the nFeature plot for normalized data

skip_tsne_plot.description: Use this to specify to skip producing a tsne plot

dim_Seurat.description: The comma-delimited list of dimensions to use for Seurat clustering

res_Seurat.description: The comma-delimited list of resolutions to use for Seurat clustering

skip_banksy_vf_filter.description: This will skip subsetting the xenium object by highly variable genes before going into BANKSY

vf_nfeatures.description: The number of variable features to keep if filtering by variable feature is enabled

lambda_BANKSY.description: The comma-delimited list of lambda values to pass to BANKSY

k_geom_BANKSY.description: The comma-delimited list of k_grom values to pass to BANKSY

nPCs_BANKSY.description: The comma-delimited list of nPCs to pass to BANKSY

res_BANKSY.description: The comma-delimited list of resolutions to pass to BANKSY

use_agf_BANKSY.description: Whether or not to use agf for BANKSY

max_iter_BANKSY.description: The maximum number of iterations to use for BANKSY

skip_pre_general_qc.description: Skip the General QC steps for pre-filtered data

skip_pre_general_dim_plot.description: Skip generating dim plot for pre-filtered data

skip_pre_general_vln_plot.description: Skip generating vln plot for pre-filtered data

skip_pre_general_scatter_plot.description: Skip generating nFeature/nCount scatter plot for pre-filtered data

skip_pre_general_nfeature_plot.description: Skip generating nFeature plot for pre-filtered data

skip_pre_general_ncount_plot.description: Skip generating nCount plot for pre-filtered data

skip_post_general_qc.description: Skip the General QC steps for post-filtered data

skip_post_general_dim_plot.description: Skip generating dim plot for post-filtered data

skip_post_general_vln_plot.description: Skip generating vln plot for post-filtered data

skip_post_general_scatter_plot.description: Skip generating nFeature/nCount scatter plot for post-filtered data

skip_post_general_nfeature_plot.description: Skip generating nFeature plot for post-filtered data

skip_post_general_ncount_plot.description: Skip generating nCount plot for post-filtered data

max_spearman_p.description: The maximum spearman p value to determine if two genes are co-expressed

max_spearman_r.description: The maximum spearman r value to determine if two genes are co-expressed

min_gini.description: The minimum gini score to determine if two genes are co-expressed

skip_gene_list_filtering.description: Determines whether to perform gene list filtering or not

skip_gene_pair_stats_filtering.description: Skip filtering data by the spearman r, spearman p, and gini index values

skip_marker_barnyard_plot.description: Skip generating Barnyard Plots for gene pairs

skip_pre_cell_shape_qc.description: Skip Cell Shape QC steps for pre-filtered datea

skip_pre_cell_segm_prop_plot.description: Skip generating the Cell Segmentation Proportion Plot for pre-filtered data

skip_pre_cell_shape_prop_plot.description: Skip generating the Cell Shape Proportion Plot for pre-filtered data

skip_post_cell_shape_qc.description: Skip Cell Shape QC steps for pre-filtered datea

skip_post_cell_segm_prop_plot.description: Skip generating the Cell Segmentation Proportion Plot for post-filtered data

skip_post_cell_shape_prop_plot.description: Skip generating the Cell Shape Proportion Plot for post-filtered data

skip_pre_cell_area_qc.description: Skip the Cell Area QC steps for pre-filtered data

skip_pre_area_histogram_plot.description: Skip generating the Area Histogram Plot for pre-filtered data

skip_pre_area_box_plot.description: Skip generating the Area Box Plot for pre-filtered data

skip_pre_area_overlap_histogram_plot.description: Skip generating the Area Overlapping Histogram for pre-filtered data

skip_post_cell_area_qc.description: Skip the Cell Area QC steps for post-filtered data

skip_post_area_histogram_plot.description: Skip generating the Area Histogram Plot for post-filtered data

skip_post_area_box_plot.description: Skip generating the Area Box Plot for post-filtered data

skip_post_area_overlap_histogram_plot.description: Skip generating the Area Box Plot for post-filtered data

skip_cluster_umap_plot.description: Skip generating the UMAP plot for clustered data

skip_cluster_split_plot.description: Skip generating the UMAP + Spatial Dim plot split out by sample

skip_cluster_vln_plot.description: Skip generating the marker violin plot for clustered data

skip_cluster_dot_plot.description: Skip generating the marker dot plot for clustered data

institutional_config_options.title: Institutional Config Options
institutional_config_options.description: Parameters used to describe centralised config profiles. These should not be edited.
institutional_config_options.help_text: The centralised nf-core configuration profiles use a handful of pipeline parameters to describe themselves. This information is then printed to the Nextflow log when you run a pipeline. You should not need to change these values when you run a pipeline.

custom_config_version.description: Git commit id for Institutional configs.

custom_config_base.help_text: If you're running offline, Nextflow will not be able to fetch the institutional config files from the internet. If you don't need them, then this is not a problem. If you do need them, you should download the files from the repo and tell Nextflow where to find them with this parameter.

generic_options.title: Generic Options
generic_options.description: Less common options for the pipeline, typically set in a config file.
generic_options.help_text:
These options are common to all nf-core pipelines and allow you to customise some of the core preferences for how the pipeline runs.

Typically these options would be set in a Nextflow config file loaded for all pipeline runs, such as `~/.nextflow/config`.

publish_dir_mode.description: Method used to save pipeline results to output directory.
publish_dir_mode.help_text: The Nextflow `publishDir` option specifies which intermediate files should be saved to the output directory. This option tells the pipeline what method should be used to move these files. See [Nextflow docs](https://www.nextflow.io/docs/latest/process.html#publishdir) for details.

monochrome_logs.description: Do not use coloured log outputs.

validate_params.description: Boolean whether to validate parameters against the schema at runtime

pipelines_testdata_base_path.description: Base URL or local path to location of pipeline test dataset files

trace_report_suffix.description: Suffix to add to the trace report filename. Default is the date and time in the format yyyy-MM-dd_HH-mm-ss.
